_note: LESS module: postcss can parse basic LESS syntax without postcss-less because LESS at-variable declarations and basic nesting often parse without crashing. If postcss-less is installed, full LESS parsing succeeds. If it is NOT installed, the result depends on the CSS content: plain selectors will still be extracted. This fixture documents the actual behavior: the LESS file has only standard-looking CSS class rules (the @variable and &:hover nesting may or may not cause a parse error). Accept either outcome.
_behavior: implementation-dependent: resolved:true if the LESS file parses gracefully; resolved:false with module-parse-error if postcss cannot handle the LESS @variable syntax
